title: Can the same board exist in multiple workspace navigations?
excerpt: I have a workspace called ‘Marketing’. Within this, I keep all business marketing projects. However I also have different workspaces with other departments eg. Marketing x sales. I would love for there to be a way to con…

posts.author: amy.morgan (Amy Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a workspace called ‘Marketing’. Within this, I keep all business marketing projects. However I also have different workspaces with other departments eg. Marketing x sales. I would love for there to be a way to connect a board so that it is visible in the navigations of both workspaces and universally editable. This way each department can have their own work space that interact, rather than needing a marketing x sales, marketing x events etc. If this currently exists, can someone please point me in the right direction? Thanks!

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amy.morgan , how are you? Here’s a short video and steps in the article we made to help you with your concern. Making the same board in monday.com exist on multiple workspaces | Same Item Multiple Boards

This will allow you to universally edit boards in multiple workspaces

posts.author: remkosignassist (RemkoVermeulen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Rodney, I would love to see your solution, but see that the article you mention is not available online anymore. Do you have a new URL?

posts.author: TrevorS (Trevor Schulze)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed that link was broken as well.

I would like to have the ability to have a mirrored board in multiple workspaces as well.

posts.author: Leonora (Leonora de Raad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amy.morgan ,
I would also really like to know how I would be able to do this. We have per client workspaces for software developement. If we would be able to bundle all client requests for the same area of our software within one board (accross these workspaces) this would really enhance our Monday Expirience! This is really the only thing Monday is missing for our type of usage.
